item.title: Todd Matthew’s Fascination Leads to a Breakthrough
item.description: An overview of how Todd Matthews’ interest and persistence contributed to key developments in identifying important details in an unsolved case.

media:content.media:title: Todd Matthew’s Fascination Leads to a Breakthrough
media:content.media:description: An overview of how Todd Matthews’ interest and persistence contributed to key developments in identifying important details in an unsolved case.

item.title: A Mystery Comes to an End
item.description: An overview of a case that reached resolution after investigation, highlighting how key evidence helped clarify what happened.

media:content.media:title: A Mystery Comes to an End
media:content.media:description: An overview of a case that reached resolution after investigation, highlighting how key evidence helped clarify what happened.

item.title: Lynette Hooker: Accident or Something Darker?
item.description: A factual look at the case of Lynette Hooker, examining the known details and questions raised during the investigation.

media:content.media:title: Lynette Hooker: Accident or Something Darker?
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the case of Lynette Hooker, examining the known details and questions raised during the investigation.

item.title: A 30-Year Search for a Long-Unknown Case
item.description: An overview of a long-running theft case involving a suspect who allegedly evaded authorities for decades before finally being identified.

media:content.media:title: A 30-Year Search for a Long-Unknown Case
media:content.media:description: An overview of a long-running theft case involving a suspect who allegedly evaded authorities for decades before finally being identified.

item.title: A Dark Day at the 1996 Olympics
item.description: A look back at the tragic bombing during the 1996 Atlanta Olympics, examining the events, investigation, and lasting impact of that day.

media:content.media:title: A Dark Day at the 1996 Olympics
media:content.media:description: A look back at the tragic bombing during the 1996 Atlanta Olympics, examining the events, investigation, and lasting impact of that day.
